'''Bespin''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Bespin system/Legends|Bespin system]]. It was orbited by three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and one [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].

{{Star-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Flight of the Falcon]]''
*''[[The Jewel of Yavin]]'' {{Po}}
*{{Film|V}} {{1st}}
